description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and packages conda environments across multiple platforms and GPU configurations. The workflow should be triggered by a workflow call and requires the ANACONDA_API_TOKEN secret. It should run on various environments including ubuntu-latest, 4-core-ubuntu-gpu-t4, windows-2019, macos-14, and 2-core-ubuntu-arm, and use a custom build_conda action with specific labels, CUDA versions, and cuVS flags.
